provider_targets.name: ClinicalTrials.gov
provider_targets.notes: Primary live data source. Supports structured JSON via API v2.

provider_targets.name: CTIS / EU CTR
provider_targets.notes: No stable public REST API verified; community tooling usually scrapes the web interface.

provider_targets.name: ChiCTR
provider_targets.notes: No official open REST API verified; individual records can be exported from the website and community tools scrape filtered URLs.

provider_targets.name: WHO ICTRP
provider_targets.notes: Public search portal is open; XML web service access is by request rather than a self-service public API.

results.title: A Study to Find a Suitable Dose of ASP2802 in People With CD20-positive B-cell Lymphomas
results.official_title: A First-in-Human, Phase 1 Study to Assess the Safety, Pharmacokinetics, Pharmacodynamics and Preliminary Efficacy of a Single-Induction Dose of convertibleCARTM-T Cells Armed With MicAbodyTM Protein (ASP2802) Followed by Maintenance Booster Doses of the MicAbody Protein in Patients With CD20-Positive Relapsed or Refractory B-Cell Lymphomas

P.eligibility_excerpt: Adults with histologically confirmed CD20-positive relapsed or refractory B-cell lymphoma after at least 2 prior lines of therapy are eligible.

arms.label: Group A: ASP2802 Low Dose followed by MA-20
arms.description: Participants receive ASP2802 on Day 0 and then maintenance booster doses of MA-20 in each 28-day cycle.

arms.label: Group B: ASP2802 Intermediate Dose followed by MA-20
arms.description: Participants receive an intermediate ASP2802 dose followed by MA-20 booster dosing.

arms.label: Group C: ASP2802 High Dose followed by MA-20
arms.description: Participants receive a higher ASP2802 dose followed by MA-20 booster dosing.

C.summary: multi-arm study without explicit comparator labels

primary_endpoints.description: DLTs are assessed after ASP2802 infusion and subsequent MA-20 doses during dose escalation.

evidence: Primary endpoint: Incidence of Dose Limiting Toxicities (DLTs) (Up to 10 months).
Sequential signals: design:SEQUENTIAL, maintenance, booster, followed by.

results.title: Low Dose Radiation as Bridging Therapy in Relapsed B-Cell Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma
results.official_title: Feasibility of Low Dose Radiation as Bridging Therapy for Lisocabtagene Maraleucel in Relapsed B-Cell Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma

conditions: DLBCL - Diffuse Large B Cell Lymphoma
P.eligibility_excerpt: Adults with relapsed or progressive B-cell lymphoma who meet FDA-approved criteria for liso-cel infusion and have at least one site safe for radiation are eligible.

arms.label: Single arm
arms.description: Subjects receive bridging radiation following pheresis and prior to lymphodepleting chemotherapy and CAR T-cell infusion.

primary_endpoints.measure: Feasibility of the intervention in the proposed study population
primary_endpoints.description: Percentage of subjects who proceed to CAR T-cell infusion after bridging radiation.

evidence: Intervention(s): Bridging radiation therapy, Liso-cel, Post-infusion radiation.
Primary endpoint: Feasibility of the intervention in the proposed study population (Up to 90 days).

results.title: Descartes-11 Consolidation Treatment in Patients With High-Risk Multiple Myeloma Who Have Residual Disease After Induction Therapy
results.official_title: Descartes-11 Consolidation Treatment in Patients With High-Risk Multiple Myeloma Who Have Residual Disease After Induction Therapy

P.eligibility_excerpt: Adults with high-risk multiple myeloma and residual disease after induction therapy are eligible.

arms.label: Descartes 11
arms.description: CAR T-cell consolidation after induction therapy.

primary_endpoints.description: Stringent complete response is defined according to IMWG response criteria.

O.effect_summary: Rate of Stringent Complete Response: 1/4 Participants (1 year)

results.location_summary: Bethesda, United States; Hackensack, United States
evidence: Primary endpoint: Rate of Stringent Complete Response (1 year).
Posted result summary: Rate of Stringent Complete Response: 1/4 Participants (1 year).
